function_v0.doc:
XLM-02: try_transfer from contract address.
The contract has no XLM balance, so try_transfer fails silently.
The parent catches the error and emits a fake "transfer" event that
mimics the SAC event format. Transaction succeeds (txSUCCESS).
function_v0.name: fake_transfer

function_v0.doc:
XLM-01: Regular transfer from contract address.
The contract has no XLM balance, so transfer() panics and the entire
transaction fails (txFAILED). Diagnostic events still contain the
attempted SAC transfer call trace.
function_v0.name: failed_transfer
